## Checklist

<!-- Mark completed items with an 'x' -->

### Code Quality

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes

### Documentation

- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG.md
- [ ] I have added/updated code examples if needed

### Review

- [ ] I have checked that my PR is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have assigned appropriate labels
- [ ] I have requested reviews from relevant maintainers
- [ ] I have linked related issues

### Commit Messages

- [ ] My commits follow the [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) specification
- [ ] Each commit is focused on a single change
- [ ] Commit messages are clear and descriptive

<!-- Add any additional context, concerns, or questions for reviewers -->

## Reviewer Checklist

<!-- For reviewers - do not modify -->

- [ ] Code follows project standards
- [ ] Tests are adequate and pass
- [ ] Documentation is updated
- [ ] No security concerns
- [ ] Performance is acceptable
- [ ] Breaking changes are justified and documented
